title: Shogo Takeuchi
text: Home * People * Shogo Takeuchi Shogo Takeuchi [1] Shogo Takeuchi , a Japanese computer scientist, lecturer at School of Information, Kochi University of Technology , and previously postdoc at Graduate School of Frontier Sciences, the University of Tokyo . His research interests include performance evaluation, search and learning algorithms in the computer board games of Shogi , Chess , Go , and Othello [2] .
